items.title: Queensland Olympics minister referred to AFP over voting registration

children.content: The Australian Electoral Commission (AEC) confirmed on Thursday it had made the referral.

gallery.altText: Close-up of a man in a suit and glasses speaking into microphone.

thumbnail.altText: Close-up of a man in a suit and glasses speaking into microphone.

items.title: Rundown Rockhampton hotel sells for millions at court-ordered auction

image.altText: Drone shot of multi storey concrete building with overgrown gardens, empty pool, smashed windows

children.content: After its closure in 2014, the formerly popular hotel became dilapidated and was frequented by squatters. It has now sold at a court-ordered auction for $5.75 million.

items.title: Woman accused of hit-and-run murder to stand trial

children.content: Larissa Rita Mae-Leigh Sant is accused of planning to kill her then-partner's ex-girlfriend, Kiesha Thompson, before striking her with a car while she was walking.

image.altText: CCTV shows the car moments before the alleged hit-and-run murder.

items.title: Recycling contractor accused of having employees sleep on floor sues for $5m

children.content: Allegations that a depot operator in Queensland's container exchange recycling program conducted itself in a manner that could be likened to modern slavery have been detailed during a court hearing in a multi-million dollar federal court dispute.

image.altText: A birds eye view of green sheds.

items.title: Woman dies after being hit by police car in Cairns

children.content: A 71-year-old woman has died after being hit by a police car in Cairns this morning.

gallery.altText: A police car parked at an angle off a road with police tape in foreground

thumbnail.altText: A police car parked at an angle off a road with police tape in foreground

items.title: Queensland inquiry wraps as submissions say child safety complaints were ignored

children.content: Final hearings have concluded at Queensland's inquiry into child safety, with a "lengthy" report expected to be delivered to the government on Friday.

image.altText: Two anonymous primary school-aged boys walk and balance on playground equipment in a park.

items.title: Man with 'very serious' criminal history jailed over motorcyclist's death

children.content: The man had a "very high" level of methamphetamine in his blood when he crashed into the back of Ian Welldon's motorbike while failing to stop at a red light.

image.altText: A bald man with sunglasses on his head stares straight at the camera.

items.title: Farm worker 'felt sorry' for pensioner who wanted his leg amputated, court hears

children.content: A jury hears a recording of John Yalu explaining to police that he panicked after he amputated the leg of a 66-year-old man he then realised was dying. The 41-year-old is standing trial for murder.

image.altText: A sketch of a man in a court dock with a woman leaning in speaking to him

items.title: Students return to high school as police revoke emergency declaration

children.content: Police have revoked an emergency declaration under the Public Safety Preservation Act after a Cairns high school was evacuated following reports of a threat.

image.altText: police officer motioning on the road

items.title: Whitsunday tour operators fear e-bike ban could destroy business

children.content: Guided tour operators say proposed laws banning under-16s from using personal mobility devices will put them out of businesses.

gallery.altText: A man holds a mountain bike over his head, standing on a platform overlooking a tropical island bay.

thumbnail.altText: A man holds a mountain bike over his head, standing on a platform overlooking a tropical island bay.

avatar.alt: A man looking directly at the camera.

items.title: Earthquakes hit near regional Queensland town twice in four days

children.content: Experts say this week's seismic activity is unusual, but the region has a pattern of large and clustered earthquakes.

image.altText: The needle rests in the middle of the black lines indicating the strength of the quake on a red and white graph

items.title: NRL star Arrow reveals MND has already affected his speech

children.content: Jai Arrow reveals that MND has already affected his speech after announcing yesterday he was stepping away from the NRL after his shock diagnosis.

image.altText: Jai Arrow with his face in his hands at a sports press conference

items.title: Hackers in an 'ethical battle' beyond cyber attacks and exploits

children.content: Student hackers compete in the International Cybersecurity Challenge 2026, an ethical hacking contest simulating real cyber attacks and defences with real-world consequences.

image.altText: MAN SMILING IN FRONT OF COMPUTER

items.title: Elderly woman dies 11 days after fatal crash on Queensland's Southern Downs

children.content: The woman has died of injuries sustained as a passenger in an SUV that allegedly swerved to avoid an oncoming car in the wrong lane on May 9.

image.altText: A night time photo of a Queensland Police Service car with its blue light illuminated.

items.title: Why the future of one of Queensland's last true fishing towns is on the brink

children.content: Karumba's rich fishing industry dates back to the roaring, prawning era of the 60s, but major blows are seeing a seafood decline. However, the Gulf of Carpentaria residents say they "wouldn't live anywhere else".

gallery.altText: Sunset over karumba beach, orange glow, with bird near sun in water

thumbnail.altText: Sunset over karumba beach, orange glow, with bird near sun in water

items.title: Meet the staff and volunteers who make Meals on Wheels go round

image.altText: An elderly couple show off their meals in disposable aluminium trays

children.content: For 70 years, Meals on Wheels has been serving Ipswich residents, and every meal comes with a welfare check and a conversation.

items.title: Death of Peter Hollingworth sparks difficult feelings for abuse victim

children.content: Former governor-general Peter Hollingworth, who resigned over his handling of child abuse in the church, died in Melbourne on Tuesday at the age of 91.

image.altText: An older man in a suit walking in front of a stone wall

items.title: New Qld public hospital to refuse some services for religious reasons

children.content: The Queensland premier has opened the state's first major new public hospital in almost a decade — at Springfield, south-west of Brisbane — but it won't offer some services for religious reasons.

image.altText: A hospital exterior, with an entrance sign and a 'mater' sign.

items.title: Doctor fined for book of 'WTF' surgery pictures taken without consent

children.content: An anaesthetist who worked at Toowoomba Hospital has been fined $30,000 for professional misconduct after he included confidential patient information in a self-published book.

image.altText: A doctor in scrubs and with a headband is standing in front of a piece of medical equipment.

items.title: Fraud charge dropped against Olympic swimmer Neil Brooks

children.content: Neil Brooks and his wife Linda Brooks were both charged with one count of fraud in 2017, but were formally discharged on Wednesday.

image.altText: A group walking along a street.

items.title: South Sydney and Queensland star retires from rugby league due to MND diagnosis

children.content: Rabbitohs and Maroons enforcer Jai Arrow announces he will step away from rugby league due to a neurological condition.

gallery.altText: Jai Arrow looks on during a South Sydney game

thumbnail.altText: Jai Arrow looks on during a South Sydney game

items.title: Warnings issued after surge in Queensland roadside close calls

children.content: Flashing lights on the roadside should mean one thing, but the RACQ says many drivers are not following their safety obligations.

image.altText: A car hits an RACQ van on the highway

items.title: Researchers uncover longest whale journey ever documented

children.content: Scientists analysing a database of photos find two humpback whales travelled from Queensland to Brazil, covering a record distance of 14,200km.

image.altText: A drone shot of three humpback whales in the ocean

items.title: Aussie great-grandmother to compete at Comm Games

children.content: At 75 years old, Jacky Hudson will tread an unlikely path for a great-grandmother after earning selection in Australia's Commonwealth Games lawn bowls squad.

gallery.altText: Australian Jackaroos lawn bowls athlete Jacky Hudson during a team photo
Australian lawn bowls athlete Jacky Hudson prepares to bowl on a green.
Twelve lawn bowls athletes sit for a team photo
